name: OneMain Financial
description_short: Houston, TX's OneMain Financial at 5815 Gulf Fwy Ste B350 offers personal loans with flexible terms and direct lender support.
description_long:
Situated at 5815 Gulf Fwy Suite B350 in Houston, TX, this standalone OneMain Financial branch provides in-person personal loan services for greater Houston residents. The branch operates Monday and Wednesday 8:30 AM–5:30 PM, Tuesday and Thursday 9 AM–5:30 PM, and Friday 8:30 AM–5:30 PM, giving Houston customers convenient access to licensed loan officers. The Gulf Freeway location is easily accessible and designed to serve the financial needs of the Houston community.

This OneMain Financial location specializes in personal loans designed for Houston borrowers seeking quick approvals and flexible repayment terms. Whether you need funds for debt consolidation, home improvements, or unexpected expenses, the loan officers here can guide you through the application process. For inquiries, rates, or to schedule an appointment, call the branch at 713-928-6825 during business hours.

When visiting this Houston-area OneMain Financial branch, bring a valid government-issued ID, proof of income, and recent bank statements to expedite your loan application. The loan officers can typically provide rate quotes and answer questions about eligibility within the same visit. OneMain Financial serves Houston residents across multiple needs, helping borrowers access the funds they require with transparent terms.
address: 5815 Gulf Fwy Ste B350, Houston, TX 77023

company_info.headquarters: 5815 Gulf Fwy Ste B350, Houston, TX 77023

pros: Over 100 years in business — one of the most established non-bank personal lenders
Prequalification available with no credit score impact
SpeedFunds: funds disbursed in as little as 1 hour after closing via debit card
No prepayment fees on any loan
Fixed rates and fixed monthly payments — no variable-rate surprises
Both secured and unsecured loan options available
After-hours branch appointments available for working borrowers
cons: APR ceiling of 35.99% is extremely high — near payday-loan territory for riskier borrowers
Minimum loan of $1,500 is not suitable for very small emergency needs
Maximum loan of $30,000 limits usefulness for larger financing needs
Branch closing process requires documentation (ID, proof of residence, proof of income) which can slow funding
Rates are not competitive for borrowers who qualify at banks or credit unions
best_for: Borrowers with fair or impaired credit who cannot qualify at traditional banks
Consumers who prefer in-person loan assistance over fully digital lenders
People consolidating high-interest debt and needing a fixed payoff schedule
Borrowers facing emergency expenses who need same-day funding
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best suited for borrowers with fair or below-average credit who need $1,500–$30,000 and value in-person service and fixed, predictable payments. The main caveat is cost: rates up to 35.99% APR mean this lender should be a last resort for creditworthy borrowers, not a first stop.
services: Vacation and recreational vehicle loans (boat, RV, motorcycle)
meta_description: OneMain Financial at 5815 Gulf Fwy, Houston, TX. Quick personal loans with flexible terms.
